appliedUpdates.description: Added reducer-effects-patterns.md documenting SetToast effect handling pattern (toast not immediately available after set_toast in reducer)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note about centered_rect() duplication between menu.rs and overlays.rs. Consider extracting to a shared utility module to avoid maintenance burden. Workers creating new overlay components should use the shared version.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: action-menu review found identical centered_rect() in src/ui/tui/overlays.rs:50-57 and src/ui/tui/menu.rs:56-63

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the established pattern for adding list navigation commands: (1) AppCommand variants in messages/app.rs, (2) keyboard routing in keyboard.rs per view/focus, (3) reducer routing in core/reducer/<feature>.rs, (4) boundary-safe logic in features/<feature>/mod.rs with saturating_sub/min. This pattern is used consistently for all 12 pagination commands.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: pagination-support review found this pattern used identically across Search, Playlists, and PlaylistTracks

rejectedObservations.observation: help_visible check is before menu_visible in keyboard.rs, so help blocks menu open
rejectedObservations.reason: Already observable from reading keyboard.rs code; not actionable guidance for workers

rejectedObservations.observation: PAGE_SIZE=10 defined separately in search/mod.rs and playlists/mod.rs
rejectedObservations.reason: Minor duplication; modules may intentionally maintain separate constants for future flexibility
